message:
refactor(tui): simplify PiMsg downcast pattern using downcast_ref check

Replace the is() + downcast().unwrap() two-step pattern with
downcast_ref().is_some() + downcast().unwrap(). Functionally identical
but removes the now-misleading comment about checking with is() first
and aligns with the downcast_ref pattern used elsewhere in the file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
